title: kaempferia lancifolia
intro: Kaempferia lancifolia, also known as Thai Black Ginger or Kluai Khai, is a type of flowering plant in the ginger family (Zingiberaceae), native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation and improving symptoms of arthritis, as well as aiding in weight loss and improving cardiovascular health. Kaempferia lancifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or extract, making it a popular ingredient in various herbal preparations and supplements.
